title: Ask someone to repeat or slow down
subtitle: Control conversation speed.
overview: This is essential with native speakers.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Can you speak a little more slowly?
No he entendido la última parte.
I did not understand the last part.

items.en: Can you speak a little more slowly?

items.es: No he entendido la última parte de la frase.
items.en: I did not understand the last part of the sentence.

items.es: ¿Qué significa esa palabra en este contexto?
items.en: What does that word mean in this context?
Now yes, thank you very much.
